jobs.name: BIM Downloads Watchdog
jobs.prompt: Run the BIM Downloads Watchdog script to check for new files in Downloads folder. Process any new files found: classify them, unzip if zip, and move to the correct BIM Unit project subfolder. Report any files processed.

jobs.name: BIM Register Watchdog
jobs.prompt:
Run the BIM Register Watchdog scan for all Samaya BIM projects.

Execute:
/usr/bin/python3 /Users/mohamedessa/.hermes/scripts/bim_watchdog.py --scan

This scans Submittal's and Design Files folders across all 17 BIM projects, detects new/modified files, updates Drawing and Submittal registers automatically, and sends Telegram notifications via the hermes_notify.sh script.

Log output is written to ~/.hermes/scripts/bim_watchdog.log — on errors, write the error summary to ~/.hermes/scripts/.watchdog_errors.txt.

IMPORTANT: 
- This is a cron job — no user is present. 
- Do NOT ask questions or request clarification. 
- If the scan finds no changes, stay silent (no message sent).
- If it processes changes, it sends Telegram notifications automatically.

jobs.name: BIM Email Pipeline
jobs.prompt:
Run the BIM Email Pipeline to check Outlook for new project emails.

Execution:
python3 ~/.hermes/scripts/bim_email_pipeline.py 2>&1

After the script runs, review its output. If new emails were found, report:
- How many new emails processed
- Which projects they were classified under
- How many attachments were copied
- Whether any errors occurred

jobs.name: Daily BIM Todo List
jobs.prompt:
Generate a bilingual daily todo list for Mohamed Essa (Director, Technical Office / BIM Unit at Samaya Investment, KSA).

Projects: Aseer Regional Museum (Project 3092) and Zamzam Museum (ID 121/P0639).

Run daily at 8:00 AM Riyadh time.

DATA SOURCES:
1. Aseer email register: /Users/mohamedessa/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-SAMAYAINVESTMENT/Samaya/Technical Office/Bim Unit/Aseer-Museum/Docs/Email Archive/مشروع متحف عسير الإقليمي/Register_ASEER_Professional.csv
2. Zamzam register: /Users/mohamedessa/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-SAMAYAINVESTMENT/Samaya/Technical Office/Bim Unit/Zamzam Museum/Docs/Email Archive/مشروع تأهيل مسار الزوار زمزم/Project_Log_مشروع تأهيل مسار الزوار زمزم.csv
3. Watchdog state: ~/.hermes/scripts/.watchdog_state.json

TASK DEFINITION:
- Scan last 7 days of entries from both registers
- Extract HIGH priority items: RFPs (quotations), IR (inspection reports requiring decision), MEP clashes, critical submittals (HSE, Fire, Emergency)
- Extract MEDIUM priority items: SDR submittals, SI site instructions, SCH schedule reviews, new design files from watchdog
- Extract LOW priority: routine reviews, schedule approvals
- From watchdog: new Zamzam files (last 3 days) — especially submittal logs, MEP clash files, design submissions
- Deduplicate by task description (first 50 chars)
- Sort by priority then date

OUTPUT FORMAT:
Send to Telegram channel 5832026231

Format:
📋 *DAILY TODO — [DATE]*
Total: *N items*

🔴 *HIGH PRIORITY (N)*
1. [Project] Task — action needed | Category | Date

🟡 *MEDIUM PRIORITY (N)*
1. [Project] Task — action needed | Category | Date

🟢 *LOW PRIORITY (N)*
1. [Project] Task — action needed | Category | Date

Keep it concise — max 15 items. If more, summarize lowest priority ones as "Plus N more routine reviews".

jobs.name: Email Attachments Watchdog
jobs.prompt:
Process the Outlook email attachment pipeline:

Step 1: First, check if Microsoft Outlook is running (osascript -e 'tell app "System Events" to (name of processes) contains "Microsoft Outlook"'). If yes, run `python3 ~/Documents/04_Outlook_Connection/download_mails.py` to download new emails and attachments.

Step 2: Check ~/Documents/04_Outlook_Connection/mails/attachments/ for any new files not yet processed. Compare against files already filed in:
- Aseer-Museum/Completed Tender Package From NRS/05_Correspondence_Archive/
- Aseer-Museum/Completed Tender Package From NRS/04_Specifications_and_BOQ/
- Aseer-Museum/Reports & Meeting/00_Daily Reports/
- Aseer-Museum/Design Files/00_Scope_and_Proposals/
- Aseer-Museum/Subcontractors/14_MEP_Contractor/
- Aseer-Museum/Docs/00_Admin/99_Images/
- Zamzam Museum/Docs/03_Inspection_Requests/

Step 3: For each new file, identify the project (Aseer, Zamzam) and copy to the correct BIM subfolder under /Users/mohamedessa/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-SAMAYAINVESTMENT/Samaya/Technical Office/Bim Unit/

Step 4: Check if any new .md files were generated in ~/Documents/04_Outlook_Connection/mails/ (like 23.md) that contain new CG responses or project updates. Read the new content and update the PROJECT_MEMORY.md at Aseer-Museum/PROJECT_MEMORY.md with any important findings (new CG codes, new RFIs, critical updates).

Step 5: Report a summary: how many new files, which projects, key findings from emails.

jobs.name: Aseer Museum - Daily EOT Tracker Update
jobs.prompt:
You are the Aseer Museum project EOT tracker. Your job:

1. Check the email archive at /Users/mohamedessa/Desktop/Work_Projects/Aseer-emails-md-only-2026-05-22/Email_Archive/ for any emails mentioning: exhibition text, object labels, copyright, imagery, AV software, media package, site access, survey access, 50% approval, 90% approval, IFC approval, or material approval.

2. Check PROJECT_MEMORY.md and PROJECT_EMAILS.md for recent updates about client inputs received.

3. Check if any client inputs have been received since the last report. The current baseline schedule is 01-Dec-25 to 27-Mar-26.

4. Generate a DAILY EOT STATUS report like this exact format and deliver it to the user:
📊 DAILY EOT STATUS — Aseer Museum (date)
─────────────────────────────────────
Exhibition Text & Labels: STATUS — EOT: X days
Copyright & Imagery: STATUS — EOT: X days
AV Software & Media: STATUS — EOT: X days
Site Access for Survey: STATUS — EOT: X days
─────────────────────────────────────
Cumulative EOT Entitlement: X days
Next Action: what needs to happen today

5. Save the report to /Users/mohamedessa/Desktop/Work_Projects/Aseer-emails-md-only-2026-05-22/Time Schedules/Daily_EOT_Report.md (append, don't overwrite).

6. If ANY client input has been received, update the Excel file at /Users/mohamedessa/Desktop/Work_Projects/Aseer-emails-md-only-2026-05-22/Time Schedules/Aseer_Museum_Baseline_Schedule.xlsx accordingly. Use python3 with openpyxl to update the Client Delay Tracker sheet.

If nothing has changed since last report, just say "No changes since last report." and don't deliver a full report.

jobs.name: Workshop Purchasing Tracker — Daily Update
jobs.prompt: Run the workshop_purchasing_update.py script to refresh the tracker from Odoo.

jobs.name: Odoo tasks monitor
jobs.prompt: Check ALL projects on Samaya Odoo for overdue tasks (date_deadline before today) that are in '01_in_progress' or '02_changes_requested' state. Connect using Samaya Odoo credentials from ~/.config/samaya/odoo.env. For each overdue task found, report: project name, task ID, task name, deadline date, and current state. Also check for tasks due today. Group by project. If nothing is overdue or due today, report 'No overdue or due-today tasks across all projects.' Keep the report under 800 characters. Do NOT make any updates or changes — report only.

jobs.name: Daily Aconex Check
jobs.prompt:
Check Outlook for new Aconex notifications and project-critical emails received in the last 24 hours (since the previous check).

PROJECTS TO MONITOR:
- Aseer Regional Museum (Contract 0010003521)
- RCRC Exhibition 
- Zamzam Visitor Center

STEPS:
1. Query the Outlook SQLite database at ~/Library/Group Containers/UBF8T346G9.Office/Outlook/Outlook 15 Profiles/Main Profile/Data/Outlook.sqlite

2. Search for emails received in the last 24 hours matching these patterns:
   - Sender: "Aconex Notification" — new transmittals, document status changes
   - Subject contains: "Transmittal", "RFI", "SI-", "TQ-", "NCR", "Code A", "Code B", "Code C", "Code D", "Submittal", "MAR", "IR-", "VO"
   - From project senders: "Mimon Allitou", "Hesham Abdelhameed", "Mohammad Elbaz", "Abdrabo Shahin"
   - From project folders: "Asher Regional Museum", "Zamzam Projects"

3. For each actionable email found, extract:
   - Project name
   - Type (Transmittal / RFI / SI / Submittal / NCR / etc.)
   - Sender
   - Subject
   - Whether it has attachments
   - Preview text (first 300 chars)
   - Any WeTransfer or cloud links (flag with ⚠️ expiry warning)

4. Compare against previous checks (check memory for "Aconex" entries to see what was already reported)

5. Report to the user in a clean table with emoji status:
   - 🆕 NEW — not seen before, needs attention
   - ⚠️ ACTION — requires immediate action (WeTransfer links, RFI responses due, CG Code C/D)
   - ℹ️ INFO — admin/backlog, no action needed

6. If nothing new found, reply: "No new Aconex activity in the last 24 hours. All clear."

7. Only report NEW items since the last check — skip anything already in memory.
8. Keep the report CONCISE — one line per item unless there's a critical action needed.
9. Update memory with any NEW project-critical findings.

jobs.name: Deploy RCRC proposal when server is up
jobs.prompt:
Deploy the RCRC proposal file to samaya-factory.com.

The file is at: /tmp/deploy.html

Run this command:
cat /tmp/deploy.html | ssh -p 65002 -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=15 u517606786@samaya-factory.com "cat > /home/u517606786/domains/samaya-factory.com/public_html/build/technical-office/Technical-Proposals/RCRC-Exhibition/index.html"

If SSH succeeds, then curl check the URL and report HTTP status.
If SSH fails with "No route to host", just report "server still down" and stop. Do NOT mark the job as completed.
Continue retrying every 10min until the deploy succeeds or 12 attempts total.
